next_action: Run independent subagents and black-box regression tests against skill-first workflow behavior.
title: Battle-test skill-first workflow tracker

final_summary: Battle-tested the skill-first tracker with three independent subagents and adversarial regression fixtures. Fixed skill_path traversal and mismatch bypasses, unknown project/session mutation, invalid update mutation, fake context manifests, workflow-bug intake skipping, dashboard writey tests, and visible stale command/Python leaks.
next_action: Use the 15-test Node regression suite plus tracker validation before changing workflow tracker behavior; every workflow bug must have skill identity and real ECC-loaded context proof.
validation_results: subagent A adversarial simulator: found workflow-bug intake and fake-manifest bypasses; fixed
subagent B invariant reviewer: found path traversal, mismatch, mutation, update, and writey-test gaps; fixed
subagent C UX tester: found stale visible command/Python/project-first leaks; fixed
